title: Get ₹50,000 for your daughter’s bright future from Rajasthan Govt. #govtschemes #finsaheli #govt
description:
Get ₹50,000 for your daughter’s bright future from Rajasthan Govt. 🌸

Know the benefits
🎀 Mukhyamantri Rajshri Yojana – A beautiful initiative to empower girls from birth to class 12 with financial support up to ₹50,000! 💫

📅 Launched: June 1, 2016
👧 Beneficiaries: First & second girl child born in Rajasthan (in govt. or registered hospitals)
💸 Total Benefit: ₹50,000 (in 6 installments)

🔹 Installment Breakdown:
1️⃣ ₹2,500 at birth
2️⃣ ₹2,500 after full immunization (1 year)
3️⃣ ₹4,000 on admission to Class 1
4️⃣ ₹5,000 on admission to Class 6
5️⃣ ₹11,000 on admission to Class 10
6️⃣ ₹25,000 on passing/admission in Class 12

🎯 Objective:
• Promote girl child education
• Ensure health, security & equality
• Reduce gender discrimination and change social mindset

📋 Eligibility & Documents Required:
• Resident of Rajasthan
• Girl child must be born in govt./registered hospital
• Must have: Aadhaar, birth certificate, bank account, immunization proof & school admission certificates

📲 How to Apply:
• Visit nearest Anganwadi or govt. hospital
• Or apply online via Women & Child Development Dept. portal

#govtschemes #finsaheli #govt
